summary: Frontend testing completed with 66.7% success rate (16/24 tests passed). Login issue from iteration_9 is RESOLVED. Core features working: Control Room filter ribbon positioning, preset buttons, active breakdown timers, My Tasks toggles (tech-only), Analytics KPIs, Administration hierarchy CRUD. Issues found: custom date input format error, WO modal overlay interception, missing ADMIN_CLOSURE Kanban column visibility, breakdown row expansion UX, fuzzy search not returning results, AWS page missing health pools display.

critical_bugs.issue: ADMIN_CLOSURE (PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE) column not visible in Kanban view - only 4 columns found (UNASSIGNED, ASSIGNED, IN_PROGRESS, CLOSED) instead of expected 5. Code defines PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE column but it may not be rendering or may be hidden when empty.
critical_bugs.impact: Admin closure workflow column missing from Kanban board

critical_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay intercepts pointer events preventing clicks on WO cards after Create WO dialog is opened. Overlay remains active and blocks interaction with Kanban cards.
critical_bugs.selector: Dialog overlay with class 'fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-black/80'
critical_bugs.impact: Cannot click on WO cards to open detail modal after creating a WO - blocks core workflow

ui_bugs.issue: Custom date input fields reject datetime-local format (yyyy-MM-ddThh:mm). Error: 'The specified value does not conform to the required format, yyyy-MM-dd'. Input type should be 'date' not 'datetime-local' or format validation needs adjustment.
ui_bugs.impact: Custom date range selection fails - users cannot set custom time windows

ui_bugs.issue: Breakdown rows are clickable to expand but no visual indicator (expand icon/button) is present. Users may not know rows are expandable. Also, test looked for explicit expand buttons with data-testid='breakdown-expand-*' but none exist.
ui_bugs.impact: UX issue - users may not discover expandable row feature

ui_bugs.issue: Machine search with 'fryer' returns no dropdown options. Either fuzzy search is not working or no machines with 'fryer' in name exist in database. Need to verify search functionality and test with known machine names.
ui_bugs.impact: Fuzzy typeahead search may not be functioning - blocks efficient machine selection

ui_bugs.issue: Health pools (aws-pools-*) not found on page. Settings panel with predictive_trigger_pct input also not found. Either no reliability data exists yet (empty state) or components not rendering. Code shows components should render when data exists and user is admin.
ui_bugs.impact: Cannot verify AWS health pools display or predictive trigger settings - may be data issue or rendering issue

ui_bugs.issue: My Tasks toggle with data-testid='bd-my-tasks-toggle' not found when logged in as tech user. Code shows it should render when isTechRole is true (user.role === 'technician'). May be a role detection issue or rendering condition problem.
ui_bugs.impact: Tech users cannot filter breakdowns to show only their assigned tasks on Breakdowns page

passed_tests: ✅ Login with admin credentials (admin/admin123) - working perfectly
✅ Login with tech credentials (tech/tech123) - working perfectly
✅ Control Room filter ribbon positioned ABOVE line KPI ribbon - correct layout
✅ Department filters deduplicated (ALL DEPTS, PROCESS, PACKAGING, UTILITIES) - no duplicates
✅ Control Room preset buttons (8h/24h/168h) all clickable and functional
✅ Active breakdown timer ticking on PC32 (changed from 00:48:19 to 00:48:21 in 2 seconds) - live updates working
✅ Work Orders My Tasks toggle found and clickable for tech user
✅ Preventive Maintenance My Tasks toggle found and clickable for tech user
✅ My Tasks toggle correctly hidden for admin user (role-based visibility working)
✅ Analytics Closure Rate KPI card displaying (33.3%, 1/3 closed)
✅ Analytics date slicer inputs (analytics-date-from/to) accepting date values
✅ Analytics Pareto chart section found on page
✅ Analytics department level filter button clickable
✅ Administration create process group successful (TEST-PG-001) - green toast confirmation visible
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical WO modal overlay interception issue (blocks card clicks after dialog opens). Verify PENDING_ADMIN_CLOSURE Kanban column is rendering (code defines it but only 4 columns visible). Fix custom date input format (change to type='date' or accept datetime-local format). Investigate: (1) Breakdowns My Tasks toggle not appearing for tech user, (2) fuzzy search not returning results for 'fryer', (3) AWS page health pools not displaying (may need seed data). Add visual expand indicator to breakdown table rows. Test deep-link WO modal functionality (?wo=<id>) after fixing overlay issue.
